zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Calverley, I於1238年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親William Scot de Calverley28歲，母親Mabel Stapleton43歲。他與Margaret Warde結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1317年在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: John

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Calverley, I was born in 1238, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Scot de Calverley, was 28 and his mother, Mabel Stapleton, was 43. He married Margaret Warde. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1317, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

Il a épousé Margaret Warde. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1317, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Calverley, I(이)가 1238년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Scot de Calverley(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Stapleton(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Margaret Warde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1317년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.
